targets.name: gate_us_e3_surface_code
targets.summary: Gate-based microsecond preset with 1e-3 physical error rates and the surface code.

targets.name: gate_us_e4_surface_code
targets.summary: Gate-based microsecond preset with 1e-4 physical error rates and the surface code.

targets.name: gate_ns_e3_surface_code
targets.summary: Gate-based nanosecond preset with 1e-3 physical error rates and the surface code.

targets.name: gate_ns_e4_surface_code
targets.summary: Gate-based nanosecond preset with 1e-4 physical error rates and the surface code.

targets.name: maj_ns_e4_floquet_code
targets.summary: Majorana nanosecond preset with 1e-4 physical error rates and the Floquet code.

targets.name: maj_ns_e6_floquet_code
targets.summary: Majorana nanosecond preset with 1e-6 physical error rates and the Floquet code.

notes: These target profiles mirror the official predefined qubit/QEC presets documented for the Microsoft Quantum Resource Estimator.
Every target uses exact compiler-family logicalCounts as pre-layout input and keeps the estimator error budget fixed at 1e-3 for apples-to-apples comparison across target models.
